bundle.shortDescription: Distributed peer-to-peer network for LLM inference
bundle.longDescription: p2ptokens is a distributed, decentralized, peer-to-peer network for LLM completions. Seed your spare GPU, leech inference from the swarm — no servers in the data path. Access is metered by an upload/download ratio, the seed/leech incentive model of the BitTorrent protocol.
